calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK FKA AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION EXPRESS' Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions shall be heard on the same day of Aug. 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 301. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alan Sherwood, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

Counsel for plaintiff stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK FKA AMERICAN EXPRES CENTURION BANK's Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions as follows:

Plaintiff's motion is granted and the matters in Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions, Set One, to Defendant are deemed admitted. Request for sanctions is granted against Defendant Amornrit C. Siripan in the amount of $240.00. Payment of sanctions shall be made within 10 court days of notice of this order. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2019 Set For Trial On Oct-07-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
